title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update successful
scenario: Notifications master toggle OFF: successful DFU on paired device should not trigger notification pop-up
steps: Ensure the Notifications master toggle is set to OFF.
Perform a successful DFU (firmware update) on a paired device.
Observe whether any notification pop-up appears on the screen.
expected: No notification pop-up should be triggered after the successful DFU.
